# BP-85 positive: a net/http handler asserts a request context value without checking ok.
lang: go
file: BP-85-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "net/http"

type userKey struct{}
type User struct{ Name string }

func userHandler(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	user := r.Context().Value(userKey{}).(User)
	_, _ = w, user
}
